# BGS Muhliusschule – LLM Description

## Organization
Name: BGS an der Muhliusschule – Betreute Grundschule & Offener Ganztag
Operator: Freunde und Förderer der Muhliusschule Kiel e.V. (founded 1963)
Type: Childcare / After-school care
Location: Legienstr. 23, 24103 Kiel, Germany

## Services
- Betreute Grundschule (BGS): After-school care Mon–Fri until 17:00
  - Grades 1+2: from 12:00
  - Grades 3+4: from 13:00
- Offener Ganztag (OGS): Full-day program since 2024
- Holiday care: Mon–Fri 08:00–17:00 (excluding last 2 weeks of summer holidays and Christmas)
- Homework support in class groups
- Lunch provided by Soda & Bread (no pork)
- AGs and creative activities

## Contact
Phone: 0431 – 901 544 0
Mobile: 0176 – 622 300 20
Email (care): betreute@bgs-muhliusschule.de
Email (office): buero@bgs-muhliusschule.de
Office hours: Mon–Fri from 11:00

## Pages
- /: Home – Welcome, highlights, CTA
- /ueber-uns: About – History since 1963, philosophy, values
- /betreuung: Care – Schedule, daily routine, activities
- /offener-ganztag: OGS – Extended day program since 2024
- /team: Team – Staff including directors Thorben Schulz and Daniel Schmidt
- /eltern-info: Parents – ABC guide, costs, discounts, lunch info
- /anmeldung: Registration – Digital sign-up form
- /galerie: Gallery – Photos of rooms, activities, trips
- /kontakt: Contact – Form, address, directions
- /impressum: Legal – Imprint and privacy policy

## Tech Stack
Next.js 16 App Router · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · Framer Motion · shadcn/ui · react-hook-form · Zod
